rules: Select the primary subject area of the Intent.
Record secondary Domains only as context.
Use DOMAIN-OTHER only with a custom ontology and risk rationale.

domains.name: Business Domain
domains.definition: Business Domain is the subject-area profile that concerns organizations, customers, operations, products, services, revenue, cost, or business process.
domains.selection_note: Select from subject ontology and constraints, not from Project type.

domains.name: Science Domain
domains.definition: Science Domain is the subject-area profile that concerns scientific inquiry, hypotheses, experiments, models, observations, reproducibility, and falsifiability.
domains.selection_note: Select from subject ontology and constraints, not from Project type.

domains.name: Business-Trading Domain
domains.definition: Business-Trading Domain is the subject-area profile that concerns markets, trading, portfolio decisions, execution, risk, liquidity, regulation, and financial performance.
domains.selection_note: Select from subject ontology and constraints, not from Project type.

domains.name: Education Domain
domains.definition: Education Domain is the subject-area profile that concerns learning objectives, instruction, assessment, curriculum, learners, and educational outcomes.
domains.selection_note: Select from subject ontology and constraints, not from Project type.

domains.name: Software-Engineering Domain
domains.definition: Software-Engineering Domain is the subject-area profile that concerns software architecture, code, APIs, testing, deployment, maintainability, security, and operations.
domains.selection_note: Select from subject ontology and constraints, not from Project type.

domains.name: Governance Domain
domains.definition: Governance Domain is the subject-area profile that concerns policies, authority, compliance, decision rights, controls, auditability, and institutional rules.
domains.selection_note: Select from subject ontology and constraints, not from Project type.

domains.name: Other Domain
domains.definition: Other Domain is the subject-area profile that is used when the subject area does not fit the defined primary Domains.
selection_signals: no defined Domain adequately represents the subject area
domains.selection_note: Select from subject ontology and constraints, not from Project type.
